emails.subject: Conference call Availability w/ Harry??
emails.body: Conference call Availability w/ Harry?? Jeff Rubena called to see if you'd be available today for a conference call w/Harry Kingerski re: SCE PX Credit at 2:30 our time/4:30 central. Please so advise me your availability or preferable time, if need be?? ASAP. Thanks, Joseph

emails.subject: Re: Conference call Availability w/ Harry??
emails.body: Re: Conference call Availability w/ Harry?? Sorry. Don't work. I can do 1:45 California time, or after 3:15 California time. Or 12:15 California time. Or before 11:30 AM California time. Thanks. Joseph Alamo 04/23/2001 11:31 AM
